title: Rich comforting Portuguese Cashew Pudding
description: A traditional, comforting Portuguese dessert made with cashew nuts and a silky, glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: Combine the cashew nuts and water in a blender and blend until smooth.
Add the granulated sugar, flour, and unsalted butter to the blender and blend until well combined.
Add the large eggs and vanilla extract to the blender and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the pudding thickens and pulls away from the sides of the saucepan.
Remove the pudding from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Let the pudding cool to room temperature and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve the pudding chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of granulated sugar if desired.
